# Third-party art

Only the files used by the current playable prototype, plus a small set reserved for its next visual pass, are stored in this folder.

## KayKit Medieval Builder Pack

- Source: https://kaylousberg.itch.io/kaykit-medieval-builder-pack
- Creator: Kay Lousberg
- Downloaded: 2026-07-22
- License shown on the source page: CC0. Commercial use and modification are permitted; attribution is not required.
- Project use: low-poly 3D buildings, walls, cave entrance, trees, rocks, bridge, and village props.

## Tiny Swords Free Pack

- Source: https://pixelfrog-assets.itch.io/tiny-swords
- Creator: Pixel Frog
- Downloaded: 2026-07-22
- License shown on the source page: commercial use and modification are permitted; attribution is not required. The source files must not be redistributed or repackaged as an asset pack.
- Project use: 2D player and enemy animation sheets, battle UI pieces, effects, and pickup/world sprites.

The paid Tiny Swords Enemy Pack was not purchased or included.
